messages.author: alice
messages.content: Hello, I have a problem with firmware update 2.3.1 on device X200. The installation fails with error 0x80070005.

messages.author: bob
messages.content: Are you running as admin on the machine?

messages.author: alice
messages.content: Yes, I am an admin. I also tried restarting but still the same error.

messages.author: carol
messages.content: I had the same issue last week. You need to disable the antivirus before running the update, that's the cause.

messages.author: alice
messages.content: It worked! Thanks Carol, it was indeed the antivirus blocking it.

messages.author: dave
messages.content: How do we configure the timeout on the NX-400 network module? The documentation is not clear.

messages.author: eve
messages.content: In the config.yaml file you have the parameter network.timeout in milliseconds. Set it to 5000 to start with.
